product.title: Vima Color Changing Foundation with Sunscreen – Fragrance-free - Paraben-Free and Vegan Makeup – Lightweight, Long-Lasting Coverage – 1 fl oz
featureBullets: Adapts to Your Skin: This color changing foundation transitions to complement your complexion for an even, customized finish
Lightweight, Comfortable Wear: This color matching foundation provides up to 20 hours of lasting coverage that feels weightless on your skin
Enhances Your Complexion: This skin matching foundation helps create a more even appearance while maintaining a radiant finish

Fragrance-free & sensitive skin-friendly: This color matching foundation helps create a more even appearance while maintaining a radiant finish, formulated with SPF 30, it provides an added layer of care for daily sun exposure
Easy Application: This color changing foundation makeup transitions to complement your skin tone for a well-blended look

specification.value: #42,519 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #373 in Foundation Makeup
Alcohol Free, Mineral Oil Free, Paraben Free
Fragrance Free, Paraben Free, Vegan, Hypoallergenic, Cruelty Free

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the foundation to be of good quality, with one noting it's perfect for "no makeup" days. The color match receives mixed feedback - while some say it blends well with their skin tone, others mention it's not their true color. The coverage and moisturizing properties also get mixed reviews, with some finding it great while others say it's not full coverage and can be drying. The effectiveness of the product is also mixed, with some saying it works well while others report it doesn't work at all.

reviews.reviewText: Repeat customer here! This foundation is amazing! It color matches my skin and has SPF! The coverage isn’t super thick, but just enough to cover some imperfections. I just wish there was more product in the bottle because I go through a bottle every 30 days.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I’m fair skinned , so trying to find a foundation has always been tough. I either end up looking like a clown or even pastier than I am. I saw VIMA all over the internet and thought it seemed too good to be true but I have been pleasantly surprised. It comes out of the bottle white and as soon as you spread it on your face, it literally changes to flesh color and it matches my skin tone perfectly!!! It doesn’t look like I’m wearing any makeup but it DOES look like I’m wearing makeup. So in other words, subtle with good coverage. My boyfriend even commented that something looked different (good different lol) and that was it! Just make sure to wash your hands thoroughly after applying because I didn’t wash enough and I could see the leftover makeup on my white towel when I dried my hands. Otherwise try it!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 20, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love this product and have used it for months. I ran out and so I reordered. How ever it kept getting lost. Took 3 weeks to get it in and it’s not even the same product I’ve been buying. It’s suppose to be WHITE but it’s PINK?! I’m so fricken bummed!!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 21, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Thr bottle doesn't say Vima on it but I like the product. My makeup has stayed on longer . Skin looks smoother
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 28, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love the product using only 2 pumps for me. What I do not like is the dispenser. I have to keep mine which probably is fine, turned upside down so that when I pump, I don’t have to pump it a dozen times to get it to come out. I also feel like I leave a lot of product behind when I can’t get anything to come out anymore because I’ve ordered this several times. How long are any of you getting this product to last as far as what is in the bottle?
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Acts more like a tinted moisturizer. Smells great, and color matches but not full coverage. Also it does not start out white as advertised, more of a peach color.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 15, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Great!!Just as advertised. Get the brush to apply
reviews.reviewText: I was very worried about this foundation working as advertised. It works good for me and matched my skin perfectly. Did settle in my wrinkles above my lips but it really toned down the redness in my complexion. Really pleased. Shipping was super fast. I also purchased the brush which helped smooth out the makeup to perfection. Made in China and did not cause any skin irritation and I am highly sensitive. Will buy again. Highly recommend
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 22, 2025

reviews.reviewText: This is absolutely fabulous. You will not regret this purchase.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026
Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 4, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Love the easiness of this application
This did not have Vima written on the bottle . It’s crap, it’s just like rubbing a white moisturiser on , no effect whatsoever…. You have been warned .
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on February 22, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Doesn’t do what it says it will do.
reviews.reviewText: This product is a nice cream but doesn’t change color to match your skin.
It conforms to your own skin color quite quickly and isn’t sticky like some foundation. The only thing I don’t really care for is the smell of it but it’s not super bad like some face creams.
